zh-CN.headlineFact: 巴西补时绝杀日本，美国最高法院守住美联储独立性，美伊谈判又陷入拉扯
zh-CN.headlineView: 今天的世界像一张压力地图，足球、央行、外交、灾害、芯片和能源同时发出信号
zh-CN.headlineFull: 巴西补时绝杀日本，美国最高法院守住美联储独立性，美伊谈判又陷入拉扯; 今天的世界像一张压力地图，足球、央行、外交、灾害、芯片和能源同时发出信号.
zh-CN.intro: 过去24小时，世界杯日报的主线是巴西2:1逆转日本，马丁内利在补时阶段完成绝杀；美国最高法院阻止特朗普解雇美联储理事库克，把央行独立性推到政治权力边界上；美伊技术团队被指前往多哈，但伊朗否认近期会与美国会谈。与此同时，委内瑞拉强震搜救进入第五天，欧洲与美国高温继续扩散，韩国推出5760亿美元AI芯片计划，联合国称巴基斯坦对阿富汗空袭造成至少28名平民死亡，乌克兰打击则让俄罗斯燃油短缺从边境地区扩散到莫斯科排队。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 今天真正值得盯住的，不是一条新闻的声量，而是多条系统压力同时出现。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 球场补时、央行法庭、外交酒店、加油站队伍，都是同一天的世界仪表盘。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：巴西绝杀、央行独立、美伊多哈、地震救援、热浪、AI芯片、平民伤亡、燃油短缺。

en-US.headlineFact: Brazil beat Japan with a stoppage-time winner, the U.S. Supreme Court protected Fed independence, and U.S.-Iran talks stayed tangled
en-US.headlineView: today's world reads like a pressure map, with football, central banking, diplomacy, disasters, chips and energy all flashing at once
en-US.headlineFull: Brazil beat Japan with a stoppage-time winner, the U.S. Supreme Court protected Fed independence, and U.S.-Iran talks stayed tangled; today's world reads like a pressure map, with football, central banking, diplomacy, disasters, chips and energy all flashing at once.
en-US.intro: Over the past 24 hours, the World Cup headline was Brazil's 2-1 comeback against Japan, sealed by Gabriel Martinelli in stoppage time. The U.S. Supreme Court blocked Donald Trump from removing Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook, putting central-bank independence back at the boundary of political power. U.S. and Iranian technical teams were reported to be heading to Doha, while Iran denied near-term direct talks with Washington. Venezuela's quake rescue entered a fifth day, heat alerts spread across Europe and the United States, South Korea unveiled a $576 billion AI-chip plan, the UN said Pakistani airstrikes in Afghanistan killed at least 28 civilians, and Ukrainian strikes helped push Russian fuel shortages toward queues in Moscow.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The signal is not one headline's volume, but several stressed systems appearing at the same time.
en-US.doudouQuote: Stoppage time, a central-bank courtroom, a diplomatic hotel and fuel queues all belong to today's dashboard.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: Brazil winner, Fed independence, Doha diplomacy, quake rescue, heatwaves, AI chips, civilian deaths and fuel shortages.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 巴西2:1逆转日本，马丁内利补时绝杀
zh-CN.headlineView: 淘汰赛最残酷的地方，是90分钟的努力可能被最后几十秒重写
zh-CN.headlineFull: 巴西2:1逆转日本，马丁内利补时绝杀; 淘汰赛最残酷的地方，是90分钟的努力可能被最后几十秒重写.
zh-CN.intro: 北京时间6月29日05:00至6月30日05:00，世界杯日报的核心赛果是巴西2:1逆转日本。日本率先进球并一度把巴西逼到淘汰边缘，但巴西在下半场扳平比分，马丁内利又在补时阶段完成绝杀。对巴西来说，这是一场从失控边缘拉回来的晋级战；对日本来说，这是一次距离爆冷很近、却被补时夺走的夜晚。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 淘汰赛不只考验技战术，也考验强队在失控时把比赛拉回来的能力。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 日本差一点写成童话，巴西最后一脚把标题改回来了。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 24小时关键词：巴西逆转、日本险爆冷、马丁内利补时绝杀。

en-US.headlineFact: Brazil came from behind to beat Japan 2-1, with Gabriel Martinelli scoring in stoppage time
en-US.headlineView: the cruelty of knockout football is that 90 minutes can be rewritten in the final seconds
en-US.headlineFull: Brazil came from behind to beat Japan 2-1, with Gabriel Martinelli scoring in stoppage time; the cruelty of knockout football is that 90 minutes can be rewritten in the final seconds.
en-US.intro: From 05:00 on June 29 to 05:00 on June 30 Beijing time, the World Cup's central result was Brazil's 2-1 comeback win over Japan. Japan scored first and briefly pushed Brazil toward the edge of elimination, but Brazil equalized after halftime before Gabriel Martinelli struck in stoppage time. For Brazil, it was a rescue act from the brink. For Japan, it was a near-upset taken away at the final moment.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Knockout football tests tactics, but also a favorite's ability to pull order out of panic.
en-US.doudouQuote: Japan almost wrote the fairytale. Brazil changed the headline with the last kick.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: Brazil comeback, Japan near-upset, Martinelli stoppage-time winner.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 美国最高法院阻止特朗普解雇美联储理事库克
zh-CN.headlineView: 央行独立性不是抽象原则，而是利率、通胀预期和美元信任的防火墙
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美国最高法院阻止特朗普解雇美联储理事库克; 央行独立性不是抽象原则，而是利率、通胀预期和美元信任的防火墙.
zh-CN.intro: 美国最高法院阻止特朗普解雇美联储理事库克，使这场围绕总统权力与央行独立性的冲突进入新的司法阶段。案件的关键不只是谁能留在理事会席位上，而是总统能否以政治理由直接重塑货币政策机构。如果美联储理事任免边界被削弱，市场将重新定价利率路径、通胀预期和美元资产的制度风险。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 货币政策最怕的不是争论，而是市场开始怀疑规则会不会随政治风向改变。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 央行的椅子看起来很远，其实会坐进每个人的房贷和汇率里。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：最高法院、库克、美联储独立性、总统权力边界。

en-US.headlineFact: The U.S. Supreme Court blocked Trump from firing Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook
en-US.headlineView: central-bank independence is not an abstract norm, but a firewall for rates, inflation expectations and dollar trust
en-US.headlineFull: The U.S. Supreme Court blocked Trump from firing Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook; central-bank independence is not an abstract norm, but a firewall for rates, inflation expectations and dollar trust.
en-US.intro: The U.S. Supreme Court blocked Donald Trump from removing Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook, moving the fight over presidential power and central-bank independence into a new judicial phase. The question is larger than one board seat: whether a president can reshape the monetary-policy institution for political reasons. If the boundary around Fed appointments weakens, markets would have to reprice the path of rates, inflation expectations and institutional risk around dollar assets.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Monetary policy can survive argument; it is harder when markets doubt whether rules shift with politics.
en-US.doudouQuote: A Fed chair looks far away, until it lands inside mortgages, exchange rates and paychecks.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch: Supreme Court, Lisa Cook, Fed independence and the limits of presidential power.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 美伊技术团队前往多哈，但伊朗否认近期会与美国会谈
zh-CN.headlineView: 中东外交最常见的状态，不是谈成或谈崩，而是各方先争夺谈判叙事
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美伊技术团队前往多哈，但伊朗否认近期会与美国会谈; 中东外交最常见的状态，不是谈成或谈崩，而是各方先争夺谈判叙事.
zh-CN.intro: 围绕美伊是否即将恢复接触的消息再度出现分歧：有说法称双方技术团队前往多哈准备接触，但伊朗方面否认近期会与美国举行会谈。这个信号说明，即便沟通渠道可能存在，双方也仍在争夺议程、层级和公开叙事。对海湾安全、核议题和能源市场来说，多哈是否真正开桌，仍是未来几天最敏感的变量。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 外交不是从坐到同一张桌子才开始，往往从谁能定义那张桌子开始。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 多哈可能有会议室，但现在大家还在争门牌上写什么。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：多哈、技术团队、伊朗否认、核议题、海湾安全。

en-US.headlineFact: U.S. and Iranian technical teams were reported heading to Doha, while Iran denied near-term talks with Washington
en-US.headlineView: Middle East diplomacy often sits between breakthrough and breakdown, with each side first fighting over the narrative
en-US.headlineFull: U.S. and Iranian technical teams were reported heading to Doha, while Iran denied near-term talks with Washington; Middle East diplomacy often sits between breakthrough and breakdown, with each side first fighting over the narrative.
en-US.intro: Signals around possible renewed U.S.-Iran contact diverged again: reports said technical teams were heading to Doha, while Iran denied any near-term meeting with the United States. The split suggests that even if communication channels exist, the sides are still contesting agenda, level and public framing. For Gulf security, the nuclear file and energy markets, whether a real Doha table opens remains one of the most sensitive variables in the coming days.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Diplomacy does not begin only when people sit down; it often begins with who defines the table.
en-US.doudouQuote: Doha may have the room, but everyone is still arguing over the sign on the door.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch: Doha, technical teams, Iran's denial, the nuclear file and Gulf security.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 委内瑞拉强震后民众质疑救援不均，灾区进入第五天搜救
zh-CN.headlineView: 灾难后的第二场危机，往往是资源如何分配、信息如何公开
zh-CN.headlineFull: 委内瑞拉强震后民众质疑救援不均，灾区进入第五天搜救; 灾难后的第二场危机，往往是资源如何分配、信息如何公开.
zh-CN.intro: 委内瑞拉强震后的搜救进入第五天，灾区民众开始质疑救援力量、物资和医疗资源分配不均。随着黄金救援窗口不断缩短，焦点从单纯寻找幸存者，扩大到道路、电力、临时安置和公共卫生。对政府而言，救援速度之外，信息透明和地区公平会决定灾后信任能否维持。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 地震摧毁建筑，救援不均会继续消耗社会信任。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 救援地图如果画歪了，灾区的人会比外界更早看出来。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：第五天搜救、物资分配、医疗资源、灾后信任。

en-US.headlineFact: After Venezuela's major quake, residents questioned uneven rescue support as search operations entered a fifth day
en-US.headlineView: the second crisis after a disaster is often how resources are allocated and information is shared
en-US.headlineFull: After Venezuela's major quake, residents questioned uneven rescue support as search operations entered a fifth day; the second crisis after a disaster is often how resources are allocated and information is shared.
en-US.intro: Search and rescue after Venezuela's major earthquake entered a fifth day, while residents in affected areas questioned uneven distribution of rescue teams, supplies and medical support. As the golden rescue window narrows, attention is expanding from finding survivors to roads, power, temporary shelter and public health. For the government, speed is only part of the test; transparency and regional fairness will shape whether post-disaster trust holds.
en-US.xiaziQuote: An earthquake destroys buildings; uneven rescue can keep eroding public trust.
en-US.doudouQuote: If the rescue map is crooked, people in the disaster zone notice first.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch: fifth-day rescue, supply distribution, medical support and post-disaster trust.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 意大利和巴尔干半岛继续遭遇热浪，美国也迎来高温周
zh-CN.headlineView: 高温正在从天气新闻变成城市运行、劳动安全和公共卫生问题
zh-CN.headlineFull: 意大利和巴尔干半岛继续遭遇热浪，美国也迎来高温周; 高温正在从天气新闻变成城市运行、劳动安全和公共卫生问题.
zh-CN.intro: 意大利和巴尔干半岛继续遭遇热浪，美国多地也进入高温周。极端高温的影响不只在气温数字上，还会进入医院急诊、电网负荷、户外劳动、农作物和城市交通。随着热浪持续时间拉长，政府的重点会从发布预警转向开放避暑空间、保护老人和户外工人，并维持电力系统稳定。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 热浪最危险的地方，是它看起来不像突发灾难，却能连续压垮脆弱系统。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 太阳没有新闻发布会，但城市每天都在替它交答卷。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：意大利、巴尔干、美国高温、电网、劳动安全、公共卫生。

en-US.headlineFact: Italy and the Balkans remained under heat stress, while the United States entered a high-temperature week
en-US.headlineView: extreme heat is moving from weather news into city operations, labor safety and public health
en-US.headlineFull: Italy and the Balkans remained under heat stress, while the United States entered a high-temperature week; extreme heat is moving from weather news into city operations, labor safety and public health.
en-US.intro: Italy and the Balkans continued to face heatwave conditions, while many parts of the United States entered a high-temperature week. The impact is not just a number on a thermometer; it reaches emergency rooms, power grids, outdoor work, crops and urban transport. As heatwaves last longer, governments must move from warnings to cooling spaces, protection for elderly residents and outdoor workers, and keeping power systems stable.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Heatwaves are dangerous because they rarely look sudden, yet they can keep pushing fragile systems down.
en-US.doudouQuote: The sun gives no press conference, but cities answer for it every day.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch: Italy, the Balkans, U.S. heat, power grids, labor safety and public health.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 韩国联合三星、SK海力士推出5760亿美元AI芯片计划
zh-CN.headlineView: AI竞争正在从模型参数转向电力、存储、封装和国家产业组织能力
zh-CN.headlineFull: 韩国联合三星、SK海力士推出5760亿美元AI芯片计划; AI竞争正在从模型参数转向电力、存储、封装和国家产业组织能力.
zh-CN.intro: 韩国宣布联合三星、SK海力士推出5760亿美元AI芯片计划，目标是在存储、先进封装、制造和AI算力基础设施上形成更强的国家级竞争力。这个计划说明，AI产业竞争已经不只是模型公司之间的竞赛，而是半导体供应链、能源、资本开支和政府协调能力的组合战。对全球科技产业来说，韩国是在用存储优势争取AI时代更高的位置。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: AI的下一轮竞争，很可能不在聊天框里，而在工厂、电网和晶圆之间。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 模型会说话，芯片计划负责让它真的跑起来。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：三星、SK海力士、AI存储、先进封装、国家产业政策。

en-US.headlineFact: South Korea, Samsung and SK Hynix launched a $576 billion AI-chip plan
en-US.headlineView: AI competition is shifting from model size toward power, memory, packaging and national industrial coordination
en-US.headlineFull: South Korea, Samsung and SK Hynix launched a $576 billion AI-chip plan; AI competition is shifting from model size toward power, memory, packaging and national industrial coordination.
en-US.intro: South Korea announced a $576 billion AI-chip plan with Samsung and SK Hynix, aiming to strengthen national competitiveness in memory, advanced packaging, manufacturing and AI-compute infrastructure. The move shows that AI competition is no longer only a race among model companies; it is a combined contest across semiconductor supply chains, energy, capital spending and state coordination. For global technology, South Korea is trying to turn its memory advantage into a higher position in the AI era.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The next round of AI competition may be less inside chat boxes and more inside fabs, grids and wafers.
en-US.doudouQuote: Models can talk; chip plans make sure they can actually run.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch: Samsung, SK Hynix, AI memory, advanced packaging and industrial policy.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 联合国称巴基斯坦对阿富汗空袭造成至少28名平民死亡
zh-CN.headlineView: 边境反恐一旦越过主权线，最先承受代价的往往是平民和外交空间
zh-CN.headlineFull: 联合国称巴基斯坦对阿富汗空袭造成至少28名平民死亡; 边境反恐一旦越过主权线，最先承受代价的往往是平民和外交空间.
zh-CN.intro: 联合国称，巴基斯坦对阿富汗境内目标的空袭造成至少28名平民死亡，使巴阿边境安全冲突进一步升级。巴基斯坦长期指责跨境武装组织利用阿富汗境内据点发动袭击，阿富汗方面则反对越境军事行动。随着平民伤亡数字上升，事件可能从安全问题扩大为主权争议、难民压力和地区外交危机。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 当安全行动越过边境，军事逻辑很快会撞上外交和人道后果。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 地图上的线很细，平民付出的代价却很重。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：联合国、28名平民、越境空袭、巴阿关系、地区安全。

en-US.headlineFact: The UN said Pakistani airstrikes in Afghanistan killed at least 28 civilians
en-US.headlineView: when border counterterrorism crosses sovereign lines, civilians and diplomacy often pay first
en-US.headlineFull: The UN said Pakistani airstrikes in Afghanistan killed at least 28 civilians; when border counterterrorism crosses sovereign lines, civilians and diplomacy often pay first.
en-US.intro: The United Nations said Pakistani airstrikes inside Afghanistan killed at least 28 civilians, escalating security tensions along the Pakistan-Afghanistan border. Pakistan has long accused cross-border armed groups of using Afghan territory to launch attacks, while Afghan authorities oppose military action across the border. As civilian casualty numbers rise, the episode could widen from a security issue into a sovereignty dispute, refugee pressure and a regional diplomatic crisis.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Once security operations cross a border, military logic quickly meets diplomatic and humanitarian costs.
en-US.doudouQuote: The line on the map is thin; the price paid by civilians is heavy.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch: the UN, 28 civilians, cross-border airstrikes, Pakistan-Afghanistan ties and regional security.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 乌克兰打击导致俄罗斯燃油短缺扩散，莫斯科也出现排队
zh-CN.headlineView: 能源战最清晰的指标，不是声明多强硬，而是加油站队伍有多长
zh-CN.headlineFull: 乌克兰打击导致俄罗斯燃油短缺扩散，莫斯科也出现排队; 能源战最清晰的指标，不是声明多强硬，而是加油站队伍有多长.
zh-CN.intro: 乌克兰持续打击俄罗斯炼油和能源相关目标后，俄罗斯燃油短缺从部分地区向更大范围扩散，莫斯科也出现加油排队现象。能源基础设施正在成为俄乌战争中最直接影响后方民生的战场之一。对俄罗斯来说，燃油供应压力会进入运输、农业、军需和公众情绪；对乌克兰来说，削弱对方能源体系是扩大不对称压力的方式。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 战争后方最真实的指标，常常不是战报，而是普通人排队买什么。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 前线很远，加油站很近，这就是能源战的传播方式。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：炼油设施、燃油短缺、莫斯科排队、后方压力、乌克兰远程打击。

en-US.headlineFact: Ukrainian strikes helped spread Russian fuel shortages, with queues also appearing in Moscow
en-US.headlineView: the clearest measure of energy war is not the toughness of statements, but the length of fuel-station lines
en-US.headlineFull: Ukrainian strikes helped spread Russian fuel shortages, with queues also appearing in Moscow; the clearest measure of energy war is not the toughness of statements, but the length of fuel-station lines.
en-US.intro: After continued Ukrainian strikes on Russian refining and energy-related targets, fuel shortages in Russia spread from some regions toward a wider area, with queues also appearing in Moscow. Energy infrastructure has become one of the war's most direct links to civilian life behind the lines. For Russia, fuel stress reaches transport, agriculture, military supply and public mood; for Ukraine, weakening the opponent's energy system is a way to widen asymmetric pressure.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The truest rear-area signal in war is often not a communique, but what ordinary people must queue for.
en-US.doudouQuote: The front line is far away; the fuel station is close. That is how energy war travels.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch: refineries, fuel shortages, Moscow queues, rear-area pressure and Ukrainian long-range strikes.
